titleStmt.title: SII 31.85: original edition by C. A. Padmanabha Sastri and T. S. Ravishankar
No. 85. (A.R. No. B 337 of 1936.) HAMPI, KAMALAPURAM TALUK, BELLARY DISTRICT, KARNATAKA.

summary.p: On the wall of the Saraswati temple.
It is dated in Śaka 1464, Śōbhakṛit, Kārtīka, śu. 2, Utthānadvādaśi, corresponding to October 20, Friday, 1542 A.D.

Incomplete. Records that Tippamma Bhūmaka of Chaturthagōtra purchased two vṛittis of land from Koṁdūri Telaṁgayya and Bhāgavatula Timmayya respectively and also purchased a garden situated in the Bhūparusu tōmṭa through a person (name not found), the son of sthalakaraṇam Tirumalayya of Kamalāpuram and donoted the same as a gift for maintaining the flowers, and flower garlands daily on the occasion of utthānadvādasi to the god Kariya Tiruveṁgaḷanātha for the merit of his ancestons. The gift said to have been situated in the Kṛishṇadēvarāyagrahāra founded by Śrikṛishṇadēvarāya.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī jayābhyudaya śālivāhana śakava¨rṣaṁbulu 1464 Agunēṭi śōbhakṛtu saṁvatsara kā¨rttika śu 12 śrīman mahārājādhirāja rājaparamēśvara śrīvīrapratāpa śrīsadāśivadēva mahārāyalu vijaya nagaramaṁdu vajrasiṁhāsanārūḍhuṁḍai pṛdhivī rājyaṁ cēyu
cuṁḍagānu catu¨rta (catu¨rdha)gōtraṁ tippamma bhūmakkaṁgāru tamakulaṁ muyyēḍu Iruvainoka taraṁ pitāḷlakunnu puṇyamavunaṭlu gānu tamaku Ihaparādulu kalugunaṭlugānu tamacēti vīsaṁ Iccina dha¨rma śāsanaṁ yella reḍlakunnu puṇyamavunaṭlugānu kariya tiruveṁgaḷanādhaniki vi
ḍicina pōlivoṭlu kramameṭlannanu kriṣṇadēva mahārāyalu cēśina kriṣṇapuramanēṭi sa¨rvvamānya Agrahāra maṁdu koṁḍūri talaṁgayyaṁgāri vritti1nni bhāgavatula timayyaṁgāri vritti1nni vubhayaṁ yīreṁḍu vrittulunnu kāmalāpuraṁ sdhalakaraṇaṁ tirumalayakoḍuku
ppacāta tamakaraṇīka svāmyamuna bhūparusu tōṁṭaku tū¨rppa śāsanaṁ rāyani guḍi muṁdara yicina tōṁṭanu krayaṁgā goni Udhānadvādaśi puṇyakāla maṁdu tīruveṁgaḷanādha
niki sahiraṇyōdaka dānadhārāpūrvakaṁgānu dhāravōśi tama talli taṁḍrādulaku puṇyaṁgānu sama¨rppiṁstimi gāna Ātōṁṭa valla yēmikālāna yēmi guttavittanu Āyādāyaṁ valla puṁvula tirumālalu dinapratini sama
¨rpiṁcagalavāru kriṣṇapurāna nēmu kramaṁgoni Iccina reṁḍu vrittula vallānu yiṁdu vokaṁḍu
Digital edition of SII 31.85 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
